overall.description: First-person exploration of a dark industrial Arasaka facility from Cyberpunk 2077, moving through red-lit machinery corridors, passing through security gates, and entering dimly lit office spaces to examine interactive objects.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance corridor with red emergency lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial corridor toward the red-lit security gate

large security gate structure with red accent lighting
perforated metal flooring with industrial texture
illuminated circular corporate logo on the left wall
bundle of industrial pipes and conduits running along the ceiling
row of windows showing exterior darkness or adjacent rooms

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow industrial corridor with metal grate flooring and overhead pipes. Red emergency lighting accents the right side while a circular corporate logo glows on the left wall. The camera moves steadily forward toward a large red-lit security gate in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint transition area with mixed red and green lighting

events.description: passing through the red metal security gate structure
slowing pace while approaching the glass door entrance

agents.ego_description: passing through the security gate and approaching the office entrance door

entered.detail: transparent security door with metal frame leading to the next area
illuminated green light fixture above the door
safety railing along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through the red metal gate, transitioning from the initial corridor into a transitional security area. A glass door with a green exit sign becomes the focal point ahead, while the industrial corridor walls shift to the left. The lighting mixes red ambient glow with the green exit sign illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: Arasaka equipment storage room with crates and industrial piping

events.description: entering the storage room through the glass door
ambient lighting shifts from green exit glow to darker industrial tones

agents.ego_description: entering the storage room and navigating past Arasaka equipment crates toward the back

entered.detail: large black crate with white Arasaka corporate logo and text
wooden shipping pallet standing upright against the back wall
large hexagonal illuminated panel on the ceiling
cluster of industrial pipes running vertically along the right wall
yellow triangular warning sign on the floor

segments.scene_description: Entering through the glass door, the scene shifts to an Arasaka storage room with corporate-branded equipment crates and wooden pallets. The lighting becomes darker and more ambient, with a hexagonal ceiling panel providing diffuse illumination. The camera moves past industrial pipes and caution signage toward a desk area in the back.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark office corner with examination desk and scattered personal items

events.description: slowing to examine the desk and its contents closely
desk surface and items fill the frame during close examination

agents.ego_description: approaching the desk and closely examining the tactical map and equipment left on the surface

entered.detail: metal desk with scattered items including a map and electronic device
paper map with handwritten markings spread on the desk
cylindrical electronic equipment with cables on the desk
green folded fabric or clothing item on the desk corner
focused light source illuminating the desk surface
unlit doorway leading to further darkness

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a metal desk in the dark corner of the room, focusing on scattered items including a tactical map, electronic device, and cloth garment illuminated by a desk lamp. The scene ends with a close examination of these objects before the view shifts toward a dark doorway leading deeper into the facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a red-lit industrial corridor that gradually transitions into a dimly lit corporate storage area. It begins by moving steadily forward along metal grate flooring and overhead pipes, passing a glowing corporate logo toward a distant red security gate. As the camera passes through the gate, the environment shifts into a security checkpoint where the red ambient glow mixes with the green illumination of an approaching glass exit door. The scene then opens into a dark storage room filled with branded equipment crates and wooden pallets under a diffuse hexagonal ceiling panel, moving past caution signage toward the back of the space. Finally, the camera closes in on a metal desk illuminated by a lamp to examine a tactical map and electronic devices before turning toward a dark doorway leading deeper into the facility.
